focus_points.label: Late arrivals — workload or other factors?

focus_points.label: Energy levels and daily routine
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — selected because this is a normal Bi-weekly check-in topic for a Manager. Discussing energy levels can help understand if late arrivals are impacting or are a result of energy issues.

focus_points.label: Current priorities and focus areas
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — standard bi-weekly topic. Useful to ensure alignment on what Lesley is focusing on and if priorities are contributing to the lateness.

focus_points.label: Support needed from you
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — standard check-in hygiene. Ensures Lesley has the support she needs, which could be related to her punctuality.

focus_points.label: Connection with the team
focus_points.reason: No specific signal — selected because this is a normal Bi-weekly check-in topic for a Manager. Exploring team dynamics might reveal if there's an impact from or on her late arrivals.
